summary:
We are analyzing whether women residents delay childbearin gdue to perceived career threats. Although recent trends indicate women are choosing to have children later in life—particularly after age 30—the retrieved evidence offers no direct correlation between this pattern and perceived threats to career stability within residency programs.  
\boxed{C}
